reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Y los chicos de la estación de servicio muy amables.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. And the guys at the gas station were very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2dTRxZC13RRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre paramos en esta estación,  muy buena atención,  limpieza y buena disposición oara personas con discapacidad como en mi caso, tiene rampa de acceso

(Translated by Google)
We always stop at this station; the service is excellent, it's clean, and they're very accommodating to people with disabilities, like me, as it has an access ramp.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2NDd5aUtBEAE

reviews.comment:
Este es un muy  buen lugar para tomar un descanso durante el viaje.
Con baños siempre higiénicos, brinda todos los servicios y una excelente atención de todo el personal.

(Translated by Google)
This is a great place to take a break during your trip. With consistently clean restrooms, it offers all the necessary amenities and excellent service from all the staff.
